Speakers.Speaker: Saving in the Abyss of Time

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}During explorations, you can save in the Desert of Doors. You will not be able to save on other floors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can save from the menu or by pressing {f 1 3 108}.[n]{f 1 1}
